name: Filer Community Park
description: Filer Community Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Filer, ID. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Filer Intermediate School
description: Filer Intermediate School is a place to play pickleball in Filer, ID. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available.

name: Frontier Park
description: Come play pickleball at Frontier Park in Twin Falls, ID! There are 15 acrylic courts. 3 are indoors and 12 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: Indoor courts are open only during the winter months through March.

name: Pickleball Time/Soccertime Bldg
description: Come play pickleball at Pickleball Time/Soccertime Bldg in Twin Falls, ID! There are 3 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Pierce Tennis Courts
description: Pierce Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Twin Falls, ID. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Slice Pickleball
description:
Slice Pickleball started in November 2024 and is new to the Magic Valley! 
We are in the process of implementing new courts and plan to be fully functioning in late 2025.
